scripts.check: npm run check -w @marketmind/contracts && npm run build -w @marketmind/api && npm run test -w @marketmind/api && npm run test:e2e -w @marketmind/api && npm run check:ai && npm run check -w @marketmind/web
scripts.docker:up: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.local.yml up -d && wait-on tcp:5433 tcp:6379
scripts.dev: npm run docker:up && concurrently -k -n api,ai,web -c green,magenta,blue "npm run start:dev -w @marketmind/api" "uv run --directory services/ai uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" "npm run dev -w @marketmind/web"
scripts.dev:full: npm run docker:up && npm run prisma:deploy && concurrently -k -n api,ai,web -c green,magenta,blue "npm run start:dev -w @marketmind/api" "uv run --directory services/ai uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" "npm run dev -w @marketmind/web"
